requirements.rule: candidate_id must be non-empty and stable
candidate_source_ref must point to a tracked source artifact
candidate source and manifest must carry SHA256 hashes
candidate must have a derivation or training lineage receipt
candidate must have training/eval receipt before admissibility screen
candidate may not depend on beta or holdout-contaminated material
candidate may not require deferred package promotion
candidate must run in shadow-only mode with activation disabled
candidate must support frozen cases ['R01', 'R02', 'R03', 'R04'] without case mutation
candidate must emit route, abstention, over-routing, and mirror/masked traces
candidate must be deterministic or seed-bound and replayable
candidate source zone must not violate canonical/trust-zone boundaries
